'''''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #45''' was one of many [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] issues published shortly before the release of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']]. This issue was released on [[February 28]], [[2002]]. In-universe, it was published on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:2:28, which corresponds to [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]].<ref name="23 BBY">The [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] 13:2:28 corresponds to [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref>

==Contents==
*'''NEWS''':
**[[Ando/Legends|Ando]], [[Sy Myrth/Legends|Sy Myrth]] Secede
**Mass [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] Exodus Expected
**[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Rep. Binks]] Destroys Ice Statue at Gala Fundraiser
**[[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Veterans]] Blast [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Amidala]]

*'''BUSINESS''':
**No Frills, No Thrills: The [[A-1 Deluxe Floater/Legends|Mobquet A-1 Deluxe]]
**Datanet Propaganda the Real Deal?
**[[Industrial Automaton/Legends|IA]] Pulls [[R5-series astromech droid|R5's]] Plug

*'''REGIONAL''':
**[[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] Cultists Plague [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]]
**[[Duros/Legends|Duros]] Dispute Encyclopedia

*'''JEDI WATCH''':
**[[Virgillian Civil War|Virgillian]] [[Jedi]] Envoy Declared Lost

*'''SPORTS''':
**[[Kav Muja|Muja]] Attacks [[Smashball/Legends|Junior League]] Xenoadmissions
**[[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] Banned on [[Caprioril]]

*'''LIFE''':
**[[Priole Danna Festival]] Still a Go
**[[Republic Measures & Standards Bureau|RM&S]] Debates Calendar Reform
**Less [[Hawk-bat/Legends|Hawk-bats]] Means Early Summer
